issues.title: RedisVectorStore autoconfig password did not work
issues.body:
**Bug description**
class 
`org.springframework.ai.autoconfigure.vectorstore.redis.RedisVectorStoreAutoConfiguration`

from line 63 to 64
`JedisPooled jedisPooled = new JedisPooled(jedisConnectionFactory.getHostName(),
				jedisConnectionFactory.getPort());`

comments.body: I'm not clear what the issue is, can you submit a PR or more description on how to reproduce the issue please?
